meta.description: Nepal-context skin problems knowledge base for rule-based matching

matching_rules.description: Score-based matching. Each condition has trigger_symptoms and trigger_lifestyle. Sum scores, highest match wins. Min threshold: 3 points to flag a condition.

conditions.description_en: Hormone-driven breakouts, most common in teens and young adults. In Nepal, worsened by spicy diet, stress from exams/work, and lack of proper skincare knowledge.
conditions.description_ne: हर्मोनको कारण हुने मुहासो, विशेषतः किशोरावस्था र युवा अवस्थामा। नेपालमा पिरो खाना, तनाव र सही स्किनकेयर जानकारीको कमीले यो समस्या बढ्छ।
worsened_by_nepal_context: Hard Kathmandu tap water clogs pores
Dashain/Tihar oily fried foods spike hormones
Exam pressure (SEE, IOE, MBBS entrance) spikes cortisol
Using dadi-buwa (grandma) remedies like toothpaste or lemon — damages barrier
Sharing makeup tools at functions without cleaning

morning.instruction_en: Wash face with lukewarm water and a gentle foaming cleanser. Avoid scrubbing hard — it spreads bacteria.
morning.instruction_ne: मुख मनतातो पानीले र हल्का फोमिङ क्लिन्जरले धुनुस्। जोरले रगड्नु नहोस् — यसले ब्याक्टेरिया फैलिन्छ।

morning.instruction_en: Apply a salicylic acid toner with a cotton pad on the T-zone and breakout areas. Skippable if skin feels dry.
morning.instruction_ne: T-zone र मुहासो भएका ठाउँमा कटन प्याडले स्यालिसिलिक एसिड टोनर लगाउनुस्।

morning.instruction_en: Even oily skin needs moisture. Use a lightweight, oil-free gel moisturizer. Skipping causes more oil production.
morning.instruction_ne: तेलिलो छाला भए पनि मोइस्चराइजर चाहिन्छ। हल्का जेल-बेस्ड प्रोडक्ट प्रयोग गर्नुस्। छोड्दा थप तेल निस्कन्छ।

morning.instruction_en: Apply sunscreen every morning — UV makes acne scars permanent. Choose non-comedogenic (won't clog pores).
morning.instruction_ne: हरेक बिहान सनस्क्रिन लगाउनुस् — घामले मुहासोका दाग स्थायी बनाउँछ। नन-कमेडोजेनिक छान्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: First use micellar water or cleansing oil to remove makeup/sunscreen. Then wash with foaming cleanser.
evening.instruction_ne: पहिले माइसेलर वाटर वा क्लिन्जिङ ओइलले मेकअप/सनस्क्रिन हटाउनुस्। अनि फोमिङ क्लिन्जरले धुनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Apply niacinamide serum — it reduces pores, controls oil, and fades acne marks. Very affordable and effective.
evening.instruction_ne: नियासिनामाइड सेरम लगाउनुस् — यसले पोर कम गर्छ, तेल नियन्त्रण गर्छ, र मुहासोका दाग हल्का पार्छ।

evening.instruction_en: Apply only on active pimples, not the whole face. Leave overnight.
evening.instruction_ne: सक्रिय फोकाहरूमा मात्र लगाउनुस्, पूरा अनुहारमा होइन। रातभर राख्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Finish with a light moisturizer to repair skin barrier while sleeping.
evening.instruction_ne: सुत्दा छाला मर्मत गर्न हल्का मोइस्चराइजरले टुंग्याउनुस्।

weekly.instruction_en: Apply kaolin or bentonite clay mask on T-zone for 10 minutes to deep clean pores.
weekly.instruction_ne: T-zone मा क्ले मास्क १० मिनेट लगाउनुस् — पोर गहिरो सफा गर्न।

eat_more.reason_en: Probiotics reduce inflammation. 1 small bowl daily.
eat_more.reason_ne: प्रोबायोटिक्सले सूजन कम गर्छ। दिनमा एक सानो कचौरा।

eat_more.reason_en: Zinc and antioxidants fight acne bacteria.
eat_more.reason_ne: जिङ्क र एन्टिअक्सिडेन्टले मुहासोको ब्याक्टेरिया नष्ट गर्छ।

eat_more.reason_en: High Vitamin C reduces acne inflammation and speeds healing.
eat_more.reason_ne: भिटामिन C ले मुहासोको सूजन कम गरी छिटो निको पार्छ।
कर्कुमिनले प्राकृतिक रूपमा सूजन कम गर्छ।

eat_more.reason_en: Flushes toxins. Especially important with hard Kathmandu water.
eat_more.reason_ne: विषाक्त पदार्थ निकाल्छ। काठमाडौँको कडा पानीको असर कम गर्न जरुरी।

avoid.reason_en: High glycemic index spikes insulin → more acne.
Dairy hormones in large amounts can worsen hormonal acne.
High glycemic food triggers acne spikes.

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Kathmandu tap water is hard (high mineral content) — it disrupts skin pH. Use filtered or cooled boiled water to wash face if possible.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: काठमाडौँको धाराको पानीमा खनिज धेरै हुन्छ — यसले छालाको pH बिगार्छ। सकेसम्म फिल्टर गरेको वा उमालेर चिसिएको पानीले मुहा धुनुस्।

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: During Dashain-Tihar: fried foods, sweets, and irregular sleep spike acne. Cleanse twice without fail during festival weeks.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: दशैँ-तिहारमा तेलिलो खाना, मिठाई र अनियमित निद्राले मुहासो बढ्छ। चाड हप्तामा दिनमा दुईपटक क्लिन्ज गर्नुस्।

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Kathmandu air pollution (PM2.5) clogs pores daily. Always cleanse at night even if you feel your skin is clean.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: काठमाडौँको वायु प्रदूषणले (PM2.5) दिनहुँ पोर बन्द गर्छ। राति सधैं क्लिन्ज गर्नुस् भले नि छाला सफा लागेको होस्।

budget_medium.name: COSRX Salicylic Acid Daily Gentle Cleanser

effective.note: Anti-inflammatory, but can stain skin temporarily

avoid.reason: Too acidic, causes burns and hyperpigmentation
Contains fluoride and SLS — damages skin barrier

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: If you have 10+ painful cysts, deep nodular acne, or acne not improving after 8 weeks of consistent care — visit a dermatologist. In Kathmandu: Bir Hospital Dermatology Dept (free/low-cost), private clinics in Lazimpat area.

conditions.description_en: Dark marks left after acne heals. Very common in Nepali skin tones (Fitzpatrick III-V). Sun exposure without protection makes them permanent.
conditions.description_ne: मुहासो निको भएपछि छोड्ने कालो दाग। नेपाली छालाको रङमा यो धेरै सामान्य हो। घाम लाग्दा यो दाग स्थायी हुन सक्छ।

morning.instruction_en: Wash with a gentle cleanser. Avoid harsh scrubs — they spread pigmentation.
morning.instruction_ne: हल्का क्लिन्जरले धुनुस्। कडा स्क्रब नगर्नुस् — यसले दाग फैलाउँछ।

morning.instruction_en: Apply Vitamin C serum after cleansing — fades dark spots and protects against UV damage.
morning.instruction_ne: भिटामिन C सेरम लगाउनुस् — कालो दाग हल्का पार्छ र UV बाट जोगाउँछ।

morning.instruction_en: Apply moisturizer before sunscreen.
morning.instruction_ne: सनस्क्रिन अघि मोइस्चराइजर लगाउनुस्।

morning.instruction_en: SPF 50+ is non-negotiable for dark spots. Without it, all other products are useless. Reapply every 2 hours if outdoors.
morning.instruction_ne: कालो दागको लागि SPF 50+ अनिवार्य छ। यसबिना अरु सबै प्रोडक्ट बेकार। बाहिर भएमा हरेक २ घण्टामा फेरि लगाउनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Double cleanse if sunscreen/makeup was worn.
evening.instruction_ne: सनस्क्रिन/मेकअप लगाएको भए डबल क्लिन्ज गर्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Niacinamide is your best friend for dark spots — affordable, effective, no side effects.
evening.instruction_ne: कालो दागको लागि नियासिनामाइड उत्तम — सस्तो, प्रभावकारी, साइड इफेक्ट छैन।

evening.action: Alpha Arbutin (2%) or Kojic Acid Serum
evening.instruction_en: Apply targeted brightening serum on dark spots only.
evening.instruction_ne: कालो दागमा मात्र ब्राइटनिङ सेरम थपि लगाउनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Seal everything with a moisturizer.
evening.instruction_ne: मोइस्चराइजरले सबै कुरा सिल गर्नुस्।

weekly.instruction_en: Gentle chemical exfoliation removes dead skin cells that make dark spots look worse.
weekly.instruction_ne: हल्का केमिकल एक्सफोलिएसनले मृत कोशिकाहरू हटाउँछ जसले दाग झन् खराब देखाउँछ।

eat_more.reason_en: Vitamin C from food supports skin brightening from inside.

avoid.food_ne: बिहान १० देखि बेलुकी ४ बजेसम्म घामबाट नजोगिनु

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Nepal's UV index is extremely high March-September (UV index 8-11+). This is when dark spots get permanently worse. NEVER step out without SPF during this period.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: नेपालमा मार्च-सेप्टेम्बरमा UV इन्डेक्स धेरै उच्च हुन्छ। यो समयमा घामबाट छाला जोगाउन SPF अनिवार्य छ।

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Many Nepali women use 'fairness creams' (Fair & Lovely, etc.) which contain harmful bleaching agents and steroids. These cause rebound darkening — avoid them.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: धेरै नेपाली महिलाले 'फेयरनेस क्रिम' प्रयोग गर्छन् जसमा हानिकारक ब्लिचिङ एजेन्ट र स्टेरोइड हुन्छ। यसले पछि झन् कालो बनाउँछ — प्रयोग नगर्नुस्।

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: If dark spots persist beyond 6 months of consistent SPF + actives use, or if patches are large/spreading (may be melasma — needs prescription treatment).

conditions.description_en: Skin that lacks oil (dry) or water (dehydrated). Nepal's cold winters, dry hilly air, and hard tap water are major causes.
conditions.description_ne: तेल (सुख्खा) वा पानी (निर्जल) को कमी भएको छाला। नेपालको जाडो, सुख्खा हावा र कडा पानी मुख्य कारण हुन्।

morning.instruction_en: Foaming cleansers strip dry skin further. Use a cream or milk cleanser that doesn't lather.
morning.instruction_ne: फोमिङ क्लिन्जरले सुख्खा छाला झन् सुख्खो बनाउँछ। क्रिम वा मिल्क क्लिन्जर प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

morning.action: Hyaluronic Acid Serum (apply on damp skin)
morning.instruction_en: Apply hyaluronic acid WHILE skin is still slightly damp — it pulls moisture into skin. On dry skin it can backfire.
morning.instruction_ne: छाला अलि ओसिलो छँदै ह्यालुरोनिक एसिड लगाउनुस् — यसले छालामा ओसिलापन तान्छ।

morning.instruction_en: Seal the hyaluronic acid with a ceramide-rich moisturizer to lock moisture in.
morning.instruction_ne: सेरामाइड-युक्त मोइस्चराइजरले ओसिलापन बाँध्नुस्।

morning.instruction_en: Choose a hydrating sunscreen, not a matte/oil-control one.
morning.instruction_ne: हाइड्रेटिङ सनस्क्रिन छान्नुस्, म्याट/अयल-कन्ट्रोल होइन।

evening.instruction_en: Never skip cleansing at night. Use cream-based.
evening.instruction_ne: राति क्लिन्जिङ कहिल्यै नछोड्नुस्। क्रिम-बेस्ड प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Apply on damp skin for maximum absorption.
evening.instruction_ne: राम्रो अवशोषणको लागि ओसिलो छालामा लगाउनुस्।

evening.action: Heavy Night Cream or Facial Oil (Rosehip/Squalane)
evening.instruction_en: Night is recovery time. Use a thick moisturizer or a few drops of facial oil to wake up with plump skin.
evening.instruction_ne: रात पुनरुत्थानको समय हो। बाक्लो मोइस्चराइजर वा फेशियल अयलले सुत्नुस् — बिहान मुखाकृति भरिएको हुन्छ।

weekly.instruction_en: Korean sheet masks are available on Daraz for Rs. 100-300. Use a hydrating one once a week.
weekly.instruction_ne: दाराजमा कोरियन शीट मास्क Rs. 100-300 मा पाइन्छ। हप्तामा एकपटक हाइड्रेटिङ प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

weekly.instruction_en: Apply Vaseline as the last step over your moisturizer before bed. Wakes up with extremely hydrated skin. Vaseline is Rs. 80-150 everywhere.
weekly.instruction_ne: सुत्नुअघि मोइस्चराइजरमाथि भ्यासलिन लगाउनुस्। बिहान छाला धेरै नम हुन्छ। भ्यासलिन जताततै Rs. 80-150 मा पाइन्छ।

eat_more.reason_en: Healthy fats from ghee support skin's lipid barrier. A Nepali kitchen staple that's actually great for dry skin.
Vitamin E and omega-3 for skin barrier.

eat_more.food_en: Seasonal fruits with high water content (watermelon, cucumber)

avoid.reason_en: Acts as a diuretic — dehydrates skin.

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Winter in Kathmandu (Dec-Feb) and mountain regions drops humidity severely. Switch to heavier creams starting October. Carry a facial mist (or rosewater in a small spray bottle) as a DIY option.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: काठमाडौँको जाडो (डिसेम्बर-फेब्रुअरी) र पहाडी क्षेत्रमा हावाको ओसिलापन धेरै घट्छ। अक्टोबरदेखि बाक्लो क्रिम प्रयोग सुरु गर्नुस्।

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Hard tap water removes natural skin oils. If possible, use filtered water for face washing, or add a few drops of glycerin to your wash water.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: कडा पानीले छालाको प्राकृतिक तेल हटाउँछ। सकेसम्म फिल्टर गरेको पानी प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Pure cow ghee applied sparingly on extremely dry areas (elbows, lips, heels) is an effective and cheap traditional remedy — actually proven by dermatology.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: गाईको शुद्ध घ्यू अत्यन्त सुख्खा ठाउँ (कुइनो, ओठ, एडी) मा थोरै मात्रामा लगाउनु एक प्रभावकारी परम्परागत उपाय हो।

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: If skin is severely cracked, bleeding, or shows signs of eczema (intensely itchy red patches) — see a dermatologist. Eczema needs prescription treatment, not just moisturizer.

conditions.description_en: Excess sebum production causing shiny skin and visible pores. Worsened by hot humid climate (Terai/Kathmandu summer), poor sleep, and over-washing.
conditions.description_ne: अत्यधिक सेबम उत्पादनले चम्किलो छाला र देखिने पोर हुन्छ। गर्मी-उमस (तराई/काठमाडौँ गर्मी), कम निद्रा, र धेरै धुँदा झन् बढ्छ।

morning.instruction_en: Use a foaming or gel cleanser with salicylic acid to control oil from the start of day.
morning.instruction_ne: दिनको सुरुमै स्यालिसिलिक एसिड भएको जेल/फोमिङ क्लिन्जर प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

morning.instruction_en: Niacinamide regulates sebum production over time. The single best ingredient for oily skin.
morning.instruction_ne: नियासिनामाइडले समय सँगसँगै सेबम उत्पादन नियन्त्रण गर्छ। तेलिलो छालाको लागि सर्वश्रेष्ठ तत्त्व।

morning.instruction_en: Skipping moisturizer makes oily skin produce MORE oil. Use a water-based gel.
morning.instruction_ne: मोइस्चराइजर नलगाउँदा तेलिलो छालाले झन् बढी तेल बनाउँछ। वाटर-बेस्ड जेल प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

morning.instruction_en: Use a matte finish sunscreen to control shine throughout the day.
morning.instruction_ne: दिनभर चम्क नियन्त्रण गर्न म्याट फिनिश सनस्क्रिन प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Remove sunscreen first, then use salicylic cleanser.
evening.instruction_ne: पहिले सनस्क्रिन हटाउनुस्, अनि स्यालिसिलिक क्लिन्जरले धुनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Apply niacinamide to continue sebum regulation.
evening.instruction_ne: सेबम नियन्त्रण जारी राख्न नियासिनामाइड लगाउनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Keep it light at night too.
evening.instruction_ne: राति पनि हल्का राख्नुस्।

weekly.instruction_en: Kaolin clay absorbs excess oil from pores without over-drying.
weekly.instruction_ne: काओलिन क्लेले पोरबाट अतिरिक्त तेल सोस्छ तर धेरै सुख्खो पार्दैन।

weekly.instruction_en: Weekly BHA clears blackheads and shrinks pore appearance.
weekly.instruction_ne: साप्ताहिक BHA ले ब्ल्याकहेड सफा गरी पोर सानो देखाउँछ।

eat_more.reason_en: EGCG in green tea reduces sebum. Also available cheaply in Nepal.

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: During monsoon season, humidity makes oily skin much worse. Carry oil blotting sheets in your bag (Daraz, Rs. 100-200) instead of adding powder which clogs pores.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: मनसुनमा उमसले तेलिलो छाला झन् बढ्छ। पाउडर थप्नुभन्दा अयल ब्लटिङ शीट (Daraz, Rs. 100-200) राख्नुस्।

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: Rarely needed unless oily skin is accompanied by severe acne or sebaceous cysts.

conditions.description_en: Symmetrical dark patches on cheeks, forehead, upper lip. Very common in Nepali women of reproductive age, worsened by sun exposure and hormonal changes (pregnancy, birth control pills).
conditions.description_ne: गाला, निधार, माथिल्लो ओठमा सममितीय कालो डल्लो। प्रजनन उमेरकी नेपाली महिलामा धेरै सामान्य, घाम र हर्मोनल परिवर्तनले बढ्छ।

morning.instruction_en: No harsh scrubs — melasma is triggered by inflammation.
morning.instruction_ne: कडा स्क्रब नगर्नुस् — मेलाज्मा सूजनले ट्रिगर हुन्छ।

morning.action: Tranexamic Acid or Kojic Acid Serum
morning.instruction_en: These are the gold standard for melasma. More effective than Vitamin C for this specific condition.
morning.instruction_ne: मेलाज्माको लागि ट्रानेक्सामिक एसिड वा कोजिक एसिड सेरम उत्तम हो।

morning.instruction_en: Antioxidants protect against UV-triggered melanin production.
morning.instruction_ne: एन्टिअक्सिडेन्ट-युक्त मोइस्चराइजरले UV-ट्रिगर मेलानिन उत्पादनबाट जोगाउँछ।

morning.instruction_en: With melasma, SPF 50 PA++++ is the TREATMENT, not just prevention. Reapply every 2 hours. Wear a hat outdoors.
morning.instruction_ne: मेलाज्मामा SPF 50 PA++++ नै उपचार हो। हरेक २ घण्टामा फेरि लगाउनुस्। बाहिर टोपी लगाउनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Double cleanse if sunscreen worn.
evening.instruction_ne: सनस्क्रिन लगाएको भए डबल क्लिन्ज गर्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Azelaic acid specifically targets melanin-producing cells. Safe for long term use.
evening.instruction_ne: एजेलाइक एसिडले मेलानिन-उत्पादन गर्ने कोशिकाहरूलाई टार्गेट गर्छ। दीर्घकालीन प्रयोगको लागि सुरक्षित।

evening.instruction_en: Seal and hydrate.
evening.instruction_ne: सिल र हाइड्रेट गर्नुस्।

eat_more.food_en: Foods rich in folic acid (leafy greens, dal)
eat_more.reason_en: Folate deficiency is linked to melasma in some studies.

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Melasma is NOT caused by a lack of cleanliness or the wrong soap. It is a pigmentation disorder driven by hormones and UV. Using dettol or scrubbing harder will make it worse.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: मेलाज्मा सफाइको कमीले हुँदैन। यो हर्मोन र UV ले हुने रङ्ग विकार हो। डेटोल वा कडा स्क्रबिङले झन् बिगार्छ।

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Melasma often needs prescription treatment in Nepal — dermatologists prescribe kojic acid + hydroquinone + sunscreen combination. Available at Bir Hospital or private dermatology clinics.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: मेलाज्माको लागि प्रायः प्रिस्क्रिप्शन उपचार चाहिन्छ। वीर अस्पताल वा निजी डर्माटोलोजी क्लिनिकमा जानुस्।

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: Melasma almost always benefits from professional treatment. Self-treatment alone may not be enough. See a dermatologist especially if patches are large, dark, or spreading.

conditions.description_en: Skin that reacts to products, weather, or food with redness, burning, or stinging. More common in people who have overused harsh products or fairness creams.
conditions.description_ne: प्रोडक्ट, मौसम, वा खानाले रातो, जलन, वा चिलाइ दिने छाला। कडा प्रोडक्ट वा फेयरनेस क्रिम बढी प्रयोग गर्नेहरूमा बढी देखिन्छ।

morning.instruction_en: The MOST important rule for sensitive skin: no fragrance in any product. Check labels.
morning.instruction_ne: संवेदनशील छालाको सबैभन्दा महत्त्वपूर्ण नियम: कुनै पनि प्रोडक्टमा सुगन्ध नहुनु। लेबल जाँच्नुस्।

morning.action: Centella Asiatica Serum or Aloe Vera Gel
morning.instruction_en: Centella (cica) is the gold standard for sensitive/reactive skin. Calms redness and strengthens barrier.
morning.instruction_ne: सेन्टेला (सिका) संवेदनशील छालाको लागि उत्तम — रातोपन शान्त पार्छ र बेरियर बलियो बनाउँछ।

morning.instruction_en: Keep your routine to 4 products max. More products = more potential irritants.
morning.instruction_ne: दैनिक रुटिनमा अधिकतम ४ प्रोडक्ट राख्नुस्। बढी प्रोडक्ट = बढी जलन।

morning.instruction_en: Chemical sunscreens can sting sensitive skin. Use mineral (zinc oxide / titanium dioxide) instead.
morning.instruction_ne: केमिकल सनस्क्रिनले संवेदनशील छालामा जलन दिन सक्छ। मिनरल (जिङ्क अक्साइड/टाइटेनियम डाइअक्साइड) प्रयोग गर्नुस्।

evening.instruction_en: No hot water, no rubbing. Pat dry gently.
evening.instruction_ne: तातो पानी र रगड्न नहोस्। बिस्तारै थपथपाएर सुकाउनुस्।

evening.action: Barrier Repair Serum or Ceramide Serum
evening.instruction_en: Skincare for sensitive skin is about repair, not actives. Focus on ceramides and fatty acids.
evening.instruction_ne: संवेदनशील छालाको स्किनकेयर मर्मतमा केन्द्रित हुन्छ, एक्टिभमा होइन। सेरामाइड र फ्याटी एसिडमा ध्यान दिनुस्।

evening.instruction_en: Apply before skin is fully dry to lock in hydration.
evening.instruction_ne: छाला पूरा सुक्नुअघि लगाएर ओसिलापन बाँध्नुस्।

eat_more.reason_en: Reduces systemic inflammation that shows on skin.

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Sensitive skin is often caused by overusing harsh products. The solution is NOT adding more products — it's stripping back to the bare minimum for 4-6 weeks to let the skin barrier heal.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: संवेदनशील छाला प्रायः कडा प्रोडक्टको अत्यधिक प्रयोगले हुन्छ। समाधान थप प्रोडक्ट थप्नु होइन — ४-६ हप्ता न्यूनतम प्रोडक्टमा फर्कनु हो।

budget_low.name: Fresh Aloe Vera gel (direct from plant)
Himalaya Gentle Daily Care Face Wash

budget_medium.name: Dr. Jart+ Cicapair Tiger Grass Cream

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: If redness is persistent, forms visible blood vessels (rosacea), or is accompanied by itching/scaling — see a dermatologist. Could be rosacea or perioral dermatitis.

conditions.description_en: Grey, lifeless skin with uneven texture. Very common in Nepal due to high pollution, hard water, dehydration, and poor sleep.
conditions.description_ne: खैरो, निर्जीव छाला। काठमाडौँको प्रदूषण, कडा पानी, निर्जलीकरण र कम निद्राका कारण नेपालमा धेरै सामान्य।

morning.instruction_en: Wash to remove overnight buildup.
morning.instruction_ne: रातभरको जम्मा भएको पदार्थ हटाउन धुनुस्।

morning.instruction_en: Vitamin C is THE brightening ingredient. Apply every morning.
morning.instruction_ne: भिटामिन C नै ब्राइटनिङको मुख्य तत्त्व हो। हरेक बिहान लगाउनुस्।

morning.instruction_en: UV is the biggest cause of dull skin over time.
morning.instruction_ne: UV नै दीर्घकालमा निस्तेज छालाको सबैभन्दा ठूलो कारण हो।

evening.instruction_en: Remove pollution of the day — essential for Kathmandu residents.
evening.instruction_ne: दिनभरको प्रदूषण हटाउनुस् — काठमाडौँ बासिन्दाको लागि अनिवार्य।

evening.action: Glycolic or Lactic Acid Toner 1-2x per week
evening.instruction_en: Gentle AHA exfoliation reveals fresh skin underneath the dull layer.
evening.instruction_ne: हल्का AHA एक्सफोलिएसनले निस्तेज परतमुनिको ताजा छाला प्रकट गर्छ।

evening.instruction_en: Evens skin tone and boosts radiance over time.
evening.instruction_ne: समयसँगसँगै छालाको रङ समान पार्छ र चमक बढाउँछ।

evening.instruction_en: Dehydrated skin always looks dull. Never skip.
evening.instruction_ne: निर्जल छाला सधैं निस्तेज देखिन्छ। कहिल्यै नछोड्नुस्।

weekly.instruction_en: Fresh papaya pulp applied for 10 minutes is a cheap, effective, local brightening mask.
weekly.instruction_ne: ताजा मेवाको गुदी १० मिनेट लगाउनु सस्तो, प्रभावकारी, स्थानीय ब्राइटनिङ मास्क हो।

eat_more.food_en: Seasonal fruits: mango, papaya, orange, strawberry
eat_more.food_ne: मौसमी फल: आँप, मेवा, सुन्तला, स्ट्रबेरी
eat_more.reason_en: Natural enzymes and Vitamin C brighten skin from inside.

eat_more.food_en: 8 hours sleep — this is diet for your skin
eat_more.food_ne: ८ घण्टा निद्रा — यो छालाको लागि खाना हो
eat_more.reason_en: Skin regenerates during sleep. Poor sleep = grey, dull skin.

nepal_context_tips.tip_en: Carry a small bottle of micellar water or rosewater to refresh skin midday when stuck in Kathmandu traffic. Quick wipe removes surface pollution.
nepal_context_tips.tip_ne: काठमाडौँको जाममा फसेमा मिसेलर वाटर वा गुलाबजलको सानो बोतल राखी दिउँसो छाला रिफ्रेस गर्नुस्।

conditions.when_to_see_doctor: Generally not required. If dullness is accompanied by unusual fatigue or rapid skin aging, check thyroid and iron levels with a doctor.

adaptive_layer.description: These rules fire ON TOP of any matched condition based on current context.

weather_rules.trigger_en: UV is very high today (common in Nepal, March-September)
weather_rules.tip_en: Reapply sunscreen every 2 hours. Wear a hat or dupatta when stepping out.
weather_rules.tip_ne: हरेक २ घण्टामा सनस्क्रिन फेरि लगाउनुस्। बाहिर जाँदा टोपी लगाउनुस्।

weather_rules.trigger_en: Air is dry today (common in winter hills/Kathmandu)
weather_rules.tip_en: Add a hydrating mist or facial oil step. Your skin will feel tighter than usual.
weather_rules.tip_ne: हाइड्रेटिङ मिस्ट वा फेशियल अयल थप्नुस्। आज छाला झन् टाइट लाग्नेछ।

weather_rules.tip_en: Switch to lighter moisturizer today. Focus on double cleansing at night — monsoon humidity traps more pollutants.
weather_rules.tip_ne: आज हल्को मोइस्चराइजर प्रयोग गर्नुस्। रातको डबल क्लिन्जिङमा ध्यान दिनुस्।

weather_rules.trigger_en: Poor air quality (common in Kathmandu winter)
weather_rules.tip_en: Wear N95 mask outdoors and DOUBLE CLEANSE tonight without fail. Pollution particles accelerate skin aging by 300%.
weather_rules.tip_ne: बाहिर N95 मास्क लगाउनुस् र आज राति डबल क्लिन्ज अनिवार्य गर्नुस्। प्रदूषणले छाला बुढ्यौलो ३ गुणा छिटो बनाउँछ।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: Switch everyone to heavier moisturizers in winter. Kathmandu humidity drops below 40%. Add facial oil as last step.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: जाडोमा सबैले बाक्लो मोइस्चराइजर प्रयोग गर्नुस्। अन्तिम चरणमा फेशियल अयल थप्नुस्।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: UV rises sharply in Spring. Upgrade to SPF 50 now. Peak melasma and tanning season.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: वसन्तमा UV एक्कासि बढ्छ। SPF 50 मा अपग्रेड गर्नुस्। मेलाज्मा र ट्यानिङको शिखर मौसम।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: Fungal infections and acne spike in monsoon. Switch to lighter products. Never go to bed with wet hair against face.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: मनसुनमा फंगल संक्रमण र मुहासो बढ्छ। हल्का प्रोडक्टमा स्विच गर्नुस्। ओसिलो कपाल मुखमा राखी नसुत्नुस्।

seasonal_rules.universal_tip_en: Dashain-Tihar season — rich food, late nights, increased pollution from fireworks. Pre-emptively double cleanse and increase water intake.
seasonal_rules.universal_tip_ne: दशैँ-तिहार — तेलिलो खाना, ढिलो रात, आतिशबाजीको धुवाँ। पहिल्यैदेखि डबल क्लिन्ज र पानी धेरै पिउनुस्।

lifestyle_alerts.alert_en: You slept under 5 hours. Your skin repairs at night — 2+ bad nights in a row will show as dullness and puffiness. Try to sleep by 10:30pm.
lifestyle_alerts.alert_ne: ५ घण्टाभन्दा कम निद्रा। छाला रातमा मर्मत हुन्छ — लगातार दुई रात कम निद्राले थकान र पफिनेस देखाउँछ।

lifestyle_alerts.alert_en: Drinking under 1L today? Dehydration is the fastest way to dull, tired-looking skin. Aim for 2.5L.
lifestyle_alerts.alert_ne: १ लिटरभन्दा कम पानी? निर्जलीकरण छालालाई सबैभन्दा छिटो निस्तेज बनाउँछ। २.५ लिटर लक्ष्य राख्नुस्।

lifestyle_alerts.alert_en: High stress = high cortisol = more oil + inflammation = breakouts. Take 5 minutes today for deep breathing. Seriously.
lifestyle_alerts.alert_ne: उच्च तनाव = उच्च कोर्टिसोल = बढी तेल + सूजन = मुहासो। आज ५ मिनेट गहिरो श्वासप्रश्वास गर्नुस्।

nepal_special_events.tip_en: Festival season: Increase water intake, maintain double cleansing despite busy schedule, avoid touching face during celebrations.
nepal_special_events.tip_ne: चाड मौसम: पानी बढाउनुस्, व्यस्त भए पनि डबल क्लिन्ज गर्नुस्, उत्सवमा मुहा छुन नदिनुस्।

nepal_special_events.tip_en: Holi colors contain heavy metals. Apply a thick layer of coconut oil before playing Holi to protect skin. Cleanse gently multiple times after.
nepal_special_events.tip_ne: होलीको रङमा भारी धातु हुन्छ। खेल्नुअघि नरिवल तेलको बाक्लो परत लगाउनुस्। पछि बिस्तारै धेरैपटक सफा गर्नुस्।

quiz_to_condition_matching_logic.description: Pseudo-code for scoring engine. Implement this in your backend.
steps: 1. Collect all quiz answers into a user_profile object
2. For each condition in conditions[], iterate through trigger_symptoms.primary — add 3 points for each match
3. For each condition, iterate through trigger_symptoms.secondary — add 2 points for each match
4. For each condition, iterate through trigger_lifestyle.high_impact — add 2 points for each match
5. For each condition, iterate through trigger_lifestyle.moderate_impact — add 1 point for each match
6. For each condition, iterate through trigger_environment — add 1 point for each match
7. For each condition, iterate through trigger_age — add 1 point for match
9. Return top 3 conditions with score >= 3 as primary_concerns
10. Apply adaptive_layer rules on top regardless of condition matches

output_format.routine_merge_rule: If multiple conditions matched, merge morning/evening steps by priority — acne steps first, then brightening, then hydration. Remove duplicates.
